SessionStart.command: echo '[RALPH] 🐛 Session started. Read AGENTS.md for build/run commands. Read IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for current state. Remember: search first, one task per loop, full implementations only.' >&2

PreToolUse.command: echo '[RALPH SAFETY] Before file write: (1) Did you SEARCH FIRST? (2) Is this a FULL implementation (no stubs)? (3) Is this within your allowed remit?' >&2
echo '[RALPH DESTRUCTIVE GUARD] Before bash: check for rm -rf, DROP, TRUNCATE, reset migrations, unapproved package installs. STOP if destructive.' >&2

PostToolUse.command: echo '[RALPH SECRET CHECK] Check for API keys, Supabase URLs, service keys, passwords. Replace with env vars if found.' >&2
echo '[RALPH POPIA] If file handles personal data, ensure [POPIA] header is present.' >&2

Stop.command: echo '[RALPH SESSION END] Before stopping: (1) IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md updated? (2) AGENTS.md still lean? (3) Committed? (4) Bugs documented?' >&2
